heading: Filing of confidential declarations by private persons identifying specific assets
label: 4221 Filing of confidential declarations by private persons identifying specific assets

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: After the United States obtains a final judgment or settlement in any action referred to in , any person may file a declaration identifying specific assets which might be recovered by the United States in satisfaction of that judgment or settlement.section 4201 of this title

children.heading: Place of filing
children.label: b Place of filing
children.text: A declaration under subsection (a) shall be filed with the Attorney General of the United States or with an agent designated by him for receiving declarations under this section.
